orphan bigtop-P-r2 container (surface-check crash left the completed run uncollected) — /workspace/.setup_agent archived with checksums to superseded-orphan-bigtop-P-r2-container/; P-r2 re-runs at the same pin under the patched collector

PROTOCOL DEVIATION registered per review: the spec requires a run-order index in the run pin; RunPin lacks the field for these 24 runs. The ledger row order + interleave verification (12 P/F pin pairs identical except the treatment mask, strictly interleaved) reconstructs the order completely, so the runs stand; the field must be added before any further campaign runs.
